name: Modus Ponens
description: Applies an implication when the antecedent is established.

name: Proof by Contradiction
description: Establishes C by showing its negation is impossible.

name: Mathematical Induction
formal_pattern: P(0); forall n P(n)->P(n+1); therefore forall n P(n)

name: Counterexample
formal_pattern: exists x not P(x); therefore not forall x P(x)
description: Refutes a universal claim with one failing instance.

name: Constructive Existence
formal_pattern: construct x with P(x); therefore exists x P(x)
description: Establishes existence by building a witness.
